steps.title: Use the labor clues
steps.content: The passage says Keller and her collaborators worked painstakingly for three years, made more than 250,000 images, and repeatedly invented new methods and tools. The blank must describe a demanding, difficult process.

steps.title: Reject weaker meanings
steps.content: Choice A means random or careless, the opposite of painstaking. Choice B means full of conflict, but no dispute is described. Choice C means ineffective, which contradicts the successful creation of the film. The answer is D.
